So wowmd bought three copies of the LD for this, unwarped them with his T-shirt press, read through the disk rot with his new fancy short wavelength player, and eventually it turned out no stacking was needed. Being the resident professional ChatGPT user, I saw this show for the peak it... actually wasn't, and translated it. Didn't even look at the kingmenu garbage. Paul and Muzu were willing to be coerced into looking at it too, and Marty wanted to watch it for Toshihiko Seki. Wowmd also jumpscared me with his surprise qc.
The title refers to a Shinkansen line from Tokyo to Osaka that was launched in 1987 with a grand ad campaign. I don't know how to explain it well, but the ads for it really were bigger than life at the time, and became a cultural phenomenon in itself. The train arrived to Osaka just before midnight, hence the Cinderella association. At the time, it was largely advertised as a ride for lovers or otherwise romantically involved people.  

This anime contains imagery, words, and themes that are absolutely problematic or offensive. All content of this nature reflects the opinion of any individual who assisted with botching this series. Fuck you!

title: Love Live! Nijigasaki High School Idol Club the Movie - Chapter 2 (720p)
description:
**All credit for subtitles and original files go to [Team ONIBE](https://onibe.moe) and their amazing team that brought the original TLs to us.**

We enter chapter two of the three-part trilogy finale of Nijigasaki High School Idol Club's story with Shioriko, Setsuna, Rina, Karin, Ai, and Mia's part of their continuing story. New songs, new characters, and new challenges await us as we draw closer to the finale of the Nijigasaki arc.

The 720p encode of the movie and its extras includes both hardsub and softsub versions of the files, so you're free to choose which version you download when adding this to your client. The entire download is just over 75% of what the original was. Individual Hardsub or Softsub folders are 2.2 GB on their own, a near 85% reduction in the size of the original, and a little over 50% of the 1080p version.

Playback has been tested on the latest versions of MPV as of April 11, 2026.

As always, please seed if you’re able to. My upload bandwidth is much better than it used to be (those initial seeds used to be painful, I know), but having more sources helps others whose clients may not be able to connect to mine. It also makes it less likely for my ISP to put me on a list.

Chie the Brat (1981) じゃりン子チエ [12-bit 4:2:0 Decrypted MGVC BD ISO VWBS-8214]
description:
Chie the Brat from The Collected Works of Director Isao Takahata / VWBS-8214

This release contains decrypted MGVC (Master Grade Video Coding) enhancement layer under the KDM folder.

Each ISO can be played back by Panasonic devices even in decrypted form, or compatible playback tools can decode a 12-bit 4:2:0 output.

MGVC: http://www.avsforum.com/t/1486405/36-bit-mgvc-blu-ray-only-in-japan

Due to how files are stored, an ISO is required to keep the virtual sector mapping on the .extif MVC stream without blowing up the size.

See /KDM/EDL.bin (XML text file) for a description of the virtual mapping.

Playback programs can use an H.264 MVC decoder and merge the planes according to [Patent US9392246B2](https://patents.google.com/patent/US9392246B2/en) or [Patent JP5914888B2](https://patents.google.com/patent/JP5914888B2/en) to get 12-bit 4:2:0 output.

description:
|[![Banner](https://artworks.thetvdb.com/banners/series/366263/banners/62009366.jpg)](https://www.imdb.com/title/tt10885406)|
|:-:|
|*Avid bookworm and college student Motosu Urano ends up dying in an unforeseen accident. This came right after the news that she would finally be able to work as a librarian as she had always dreamed of. When she regained consciousness, she was reborn as Myne, the daughter of a poor soldier. She was in the town of Ehrenfest, which had a harsh class system. But as long as she had books, she didn't really need anything else. However, books were scarce and belonged only to the nobles. But that doesn't stop her, so she makes a decision... "If there aren't any books, I'll just create some."*|

description:
Pom Poko from The Collected Works of Director Isao Takahata / VWBS-8214

This release contains decrypted MGVC (Master Grade Video Coding) enhancement layer under the KDM folder.

Each ISO can be played back by Panasonic devices even in decrypted form, or compatible playback tools can decode a 12-bit 4:2:0 output.

MGVC: http://www.avsforum.com/t/1486405/36-bit-mgvc-blu-ray-only-in-japan

Due to how files are stored, an ISO is required to keep the virtual sector mapping on the .extif MVC stream without blowing up the size.

See /KDM/EDL.bin (XML text file) for a description of the virtual mapping.

Playback programs can use an H.264 MVC decoder and merge the planes according to [Patent US9392246B2](https://patents.google.com/patent/US9392246B2/en) or [Patent JP5914888B2](https://patents.google.com/patent/JP5914888B2/en) to get 12-bit 4:2:0 output.

description:
**Dungeon Meshi**
![alt text](https://i.ibb.co/VYxjnB1r/meshicover.jpg)

**Titolo originale**: Dungeon Meshi
**Anno:** 2024
**Genere:** Avventura, Commedia, Cucina, Fantasy 

**Trama**
Dopo che sua sorella è stata divorata da un drago e dopo aver perso tutte le scorte in un raid andato male in un dungeon, Laios è determinato a salvarla, assieme al suo party, prima che venga digerita. Il gruppo incontra un nano che li introduce al mondo del dungeon culinario; deliziosi pranzetti possono essere preparati grazie ad ingredienti come carne di pipistrello gigante, funghi camminanti o mandragore urlanti.

貴族から庶民になったので、婚約を解消されました！ 03
[VCB-Studio] 玉响 / Tamayura / たまゆら 10-bit 1080p HEVC BDRip [OVA + S1 + S2 + Movie Reseed Fin]
description:
![Tamayura.webp](https://img.2222.moe/images/2026/04/07/tamayura_800.webp)  

玉响 / Tamayura / たまゆら OVA + S1 + S2 + Movie BDRip Reseed   

OVA + S2 + Movie 内封评论音轨。S1 部分剧集内封评论音轨。  
OVA + S2 + Movie: Embedded commentary track. S1: Certain episodes contain commentary tracks.   

虽然玉响全系列时间跨度比较长，年代也算久远，好在其画面性质基本一致，制作也比较简单。只需要过个流程一般处理一下色带就好。因为画面柔和，动态程度较低，所以本片也比较节省码率，搭配 HEVC 编码可以非常有效地控制体积。  
Although it is a long and old series, all seasons of Tamayura feature the same, friendly quality metric. We only performed some slight debanding for it. Due to the soft motion and blurry edges, bit-rate required is pretty low and the quality of encode can still be decent enough.  


* * *

重发修正：  
1\. 按季度重新拆分整理；   
2\. 删除 readme about WebP.txt；   
3\. 增加收录 BDBOX 的特典专辑。

6\. 按现行规范重新整理专辑。

6\. 调整部分特典命名；

S2 (More Aggressive):

6\. Reorganize CDs per current standards.

title: [SubsPlease] Maou no Musume wa Yasashi Sugiru!! (01-12) (1080p) [Unofficial Batch]
description:
# Maou no Musume wa Yasashi Sugiru!!

![Maoumusu](https://i.imgur.com/qEHELMf.png "Maoumusu")

### Summary
Demon King Ahriman has a problem: his daughter, Doux, loves everyone! Consequently, Ahriman had to halt his invasion of the world in the worry that his daughter's behavior is not one befitting someone of her kind. She loves making friends, helping others, and bringing happiness to all creatures including their enemies, the humans.

Ahriman, however, congratulates Doux for her good deeds instead of scolding her. With the help of his aide Jahi, who is assigned as Doux's master, the two try to get rid of her kindhearted nature—so that the Demon King's daughter goes from a cute, adorable, and nice little girl to an inhuman, cruel, and twisted little demon.

### Other info
**Aired:** Winter 2026
**Length:** 12 episodes x 24 minutes
**File format:** MKV, soft subs

title: Horus Prince of the Sun (1968) 太陽の王子 ホルスの大冒険 [12-bit 4:2:0 Decrypted MGVC BD ISO VWBS-8214]
description:
Horus Prince of the Sun from The Collected Works of Director Isao Takahata / VWBS-8214

This release contains decrypted MGVC (Master Grade Video Coding) enhancement layer under the KDM folder.

Each ISO can be played back by Panasonic devices even in decrypted form, or compatible playback tools can decode a 12-bit 4:2:0 output.

MGVC: http://www.avsforum.com/t/1486405/36-bit-mgvc-blu-ray-only-in-japan

Due to how files are stored, an ISO is required to keep the virtual sector mapping on the .extif MVC stream without blowing up the size.

See /KDM/EDL.bin (XML text file) for a description of the virtual mapping.

Playback programs can use an H.264 MVC decoder and merge the planes according to [Patent US9392246B2](https://patents.google.com/patent/US9392246B2/en) or [Patent JP5914888B2](https://patents.google.com/patent/JP5914888B2/en) to get 12-bit 4:2:0 output.

title: Only Yesterday (1991) おもひでぽろぽろ [12-bit 4:2:0 Decrypted MGVC BD ISO VWBS-8214]
description:
Only Yesterday from The Collected Works of Director Isao Takahata / VWBS-8214

This release contains decrypted MGVC (Master Grade Video Coding) enhancement layer under the KDM folder.

Each ISO can be played back by Panasonic devices even in decrypted form, or compatible playback tools can decode a 12-bit 4:2:0 output.

MGVC: http://www.avsforum.com/t/1486405/36-bit-mgvc-blu-ray-only-in-japan

Due to how files are stored, an ISO is required to keep the virtual sector mapping on the .extif MVC stream without blowing up the size.

See /KDM/EDL.bin (XML text file) for a description of the virtual mapping.

Playback programs can use an H.264 MVC decoder and merge the planes according to [Patent US9392246B2](https://patents.google.com/patent/US9392246B2/en) or [Patent JP5914888B2](https://patents.google.com/patent/JP5914888B2/en) to get 12-bit 4:2:0 output.

Существует предмет, известный как «Ветвь реинкарнации», который может наделять людей талантами из прошлых жизней, если они перережут себе горло этим предметом.
Тоя Сэндзи — подросток, страдающий от низкой самооценки, поскольку вырос в тени своего одаренного старшего брата. Он приходит к выводу, что учеба — его последний шанс найти свой талант, но не может обрести удовлетворение, несмотря на то, что постоянно входит в сотню лучших на национальных пробных экзаменах.
По иронии судьбы Тоя встречает одну из своих одноклассниц, Хайто Луо Баффет, «Возвращенную», которая воскресила таланты своей прошлой жизни с помощью Ветви реинкарнации, когда она сражается с серийным убийцей.

К счастью, его находит могучая девушка-охотница по имени Ламмис, утаскивающая незадачливого перерожденца с собой в деревню. Ну а там возможность бесконечно генерировать готовую еду и прочие полезные вещи быстро находит своё применение…

description:
#### **Main info:**
- `[Trix]` -> that's me (@nekotrix), join [![](https://www.google.com/s2/favicons?domain=discord.com) AV1 weeb edition](https://discord.gg/83dRFDFDp7)
`Sentenced to Be a Hero` -> anime title, info on [![](https://www.google.com/s2/favicons?domain=anidb.net) AniDB](https://anidb.net/anime/18124), [![](https://www.google.com/s2/favicons?domain=myanimelist.net) MyAnimeList](https://myanimelist.net/anime/56009), [![](https://www.google.com/s2/favicons?domain=anilist.co) AniList](https://anilist.co/anime/167152)
`S01` -> season number, following [![](https://www.google.com/s2/favicons?domain=thetvdb.com) TheTVDB](https://www.thetvdb.com/series/sentenced-to-brave-punishment)'s scheme
`v2` -> includes significant enough changes over a previously existing release (details below)
`Batch` -> contains the complete season
- `WEBRip` -> encode from a WEB-DL source (here Crunchyroll via [![](https://www.google.com/s2/favicons?domain=nyaa.si) varyg1001](https://nyaa.si/user/varyg1001))
`1080p` -> video resolution (1920x1080 @ 23.976 FPS)
`AV1` -> 📺 video format (Main + 4:2:0 + 10-bit = hardware friendly)
`Opus` -> 🔊 audio format (Stereo 2.0 @ 96kbps)
- `Dual Audio` -> 🔊 dual audio tracks: **Japanese 🇯🇵 & English 🇺🇸**
`Multi Subs` -> 📄 multiple subtitles tracks including: **English (Forced), English, English (SDH), French, Arabic, Spanish, Spanish, German, Italian, Portuguese, Russian, Chinese, Indonesian, Malay, Thai, Vietnamese**
`VOSTFR` -> keyword to denote the presence of french subtitles
***
#### **Misc info:**
**Encoding details:**
- Filtering: Mild denoising
- Encoder: [SVT-AV1-Essential](https://github.com/nekotrix/SVT-AV1-Essential/): `--speed slow --crf 32`

*v2 note:* No updated encodes except E01 which was suboptimal in various aspects. Expect all-around improved encodes for a future BD batch. Added missing English dub in E12 (thanks Crunchyroll...), re-encoded all audio tracks due to occasional audio popping issues. Added missing subtitles (when available) and improved chapters. See y'all for Season 2!

> **Tired of VLC acting up with Opus audio, with subtitles, with color rendition? We recommend the _MPV_ media player for the best playback experience ([TheWiki Guide](https://thewiki.moe/guides/playback/)). Always keep your software up-to-date!**

> **Direct Download Link:** [Episodes DDL, attachments download & more](https://animetosho.org/view/k10283135634688) on AnimeTosho

**Language Options**
You can [download here](https://mega.nz/folder/kcQhWZCA#c4wfvx2RXI9XN8XeBso09g) two scripts that do the following (Windows/macOS-Linux):

- *Keep Japanese*: Throws out all audio tracks other than Japanese
- *Keep English*: Throws out all audio and subtitles tracks other than English

Put all the video files into the *Language Options* folder and run the corresponding script. The resulting files can be found in the *output* folder.

Note: [MKVToolNix](https://mkvtoolnix.download/downloads.html) must be installed on your system
***

title: [Kylian] Nisekoi Intégrale (S01 + S02 + OVAs) MULTi (FRENCH, VF, VOSTFR) BD 1080p HEVC FLAC (Nisekoi: False Love, Nisekoi:, Nisekoi 2, Nisekoi 2nd Season, Nisekoi OVA, Nisekoi: OVA)
description:
![alt text](https://i.imgur.com/NhgKSLT.png)

*Bien que fils d’un chef de clan yakuza, Raku Ichijô fait de son mieux pour se comporter en lycéen ordinaire. Son quotidien tourne au cauchemar quand Chitoge Kirisaki, une nouvelle élève très querelleuse et fille du chef d’un clan adverse, arrive dans sa classe. Pour éviter une guerre des gangs, ces deux lycéens que tout oppose vont être contraints de jouer les amoureux transis... alors qu’ils se détestent !*

# 💿 Informations techniques
| | Description | Source |
| :--- | :--- | :--- |
| Vidéo | BD 1080p HEVC 10 bits | [VCB](https://nyaa.si/view/1709362) |
| Audio | Français FLAC 2.0, Japonais FLAC 2.0 | BDFR, [VCB](https://nyaa.si/view/1709362) |
| Sous-titres | Forcés (S1 uniquement), complets | ADN |

# 👥 Crédits
**Traduction, adaptation :** ADN (S1 & S2), moi (OAVs)
**Time / Repérage :** moi
**Édition :** [Commie](https://nyaa.si/user/Commie?f=0&c=0_0&q=Nisekoi) (+ modifications), moi (série) ; moi (OAVs)
**Karaokés :** repris de FFF via [Tenrai_Sensei](https://nyaa.si/view/1557124) + retime, corrections des romaji, changement de style et ajout / modifications d’effets
**Traduction des génériques :**
- S1 OP 1, 2, ED 2, 4, 6, 7, S2 OP 1, ED 1, 3, 5, 7, ED OAV n°2 : moi
- S1 ED 2, 3, 5, S2 OP 2, S2 ED 2, 4, 6 : Shamrock

**QC :** Nagutos, Shamrock, moi
**CDs :** [VCB](https://nyaa.si/view/1709362)

# 📝 Notes de release
- Le repérage des subs d’ADN étant très mal foutu et inconfortable, j’ai pris l’initiative de retime **intégralement** l’entièreté des épisodes sur les deux saisons. Cela inclut les temps de début, de fin, les keyframes, mais également du split / group de lignes, l’ajout de césures et de tirets. C’était pas une mince affaire, surtout sur cette série, mais c’est désormais bien plus confortable à lire, et la traduction respire bien plus qu’avant.
- Quelques retouches ont été faites dans la traduction : corrections de coquilles, légères retouches de ponctuation, 2 / 3 reformulations, modification / ajouts de sauts de ligne.
J’ai également rajouté le nom du traducteur dans les crédits, son nom étant absent des fichiers.
- La VF n’est disponible que sur la S1, la S2 n’ayant pas été doublée.
- L’audio VF disposait d’ailleurs d’un souci de compression sur les sons et ambiances (effet d’applatissement, de saturation au niveau des basses notamment).
J’ai donc remonté la VF en ne récupérant que les dialogues, et en injectant dedans les génériques depuis les pistes audio VO, qui n’avaient pas le problème. Impossible de sauver le reste, étant donné que les dialogues sont par-dessus, mais ç’a permis d’épargner les génériques.
- Les édits de Commie ont été modifiés et parfois refaits de zéro, pour la cohérence ou améliorer le rendu. Ceux qui n’avaient pas été faits ont été effectués.
- Concernant les OAVs, les traductions fansub existantes étant trop moyennes voire mauvaises à mon goût, j’ai tout retraduit de zéro. Ces OAV bénéficient donc d’une nouvelle traduction, appuyée par le manga FR (traduit par la même personne) lorsque c’était possible, tout en essayant de rester le plus fidèle possible à l’adapt existante sur la série.
Plusieurs relectures ont été faites pour garantir des sous-titres aussi soignés que possible.
- J’ai utilisé la numérotation de TMDB pour les OAVs. Si vous utilisez TVDB, renommez l’OAV 3 (S00E04) en S00E03 pour qu’il soit correctement reconnu.
- Cette release contient une archive des subs et fonts au format MKS, classés par saison. Si la raw que j’ai choisie ne vous convient pas, ou que vous possédez la vôtre, vous pourrez glisser / déposer les MKS directement dans votre lecteur pour charger les sous-titres avec les polices.

description:
ガイアの夜明け【働いて、幸せになる】アイデア製品をつくる中小企業で働く人たち　
テレ東
4月10日 金曜 22:00 -22:54 
“嫌われ者”が中国の工場へ…大問題が発生！2歳の娘を残して妻が他界…働き続けた父親がサラリーマン最後の日に語ったことは？高卒4年目の若手社員が大変身！？

	日本企業の99.7％を占め、労働人口のおよそ7割、3200万人を抱える中小企業。それは、激動する世界の中で大きな波に飲まれた小さな葉のように揺れ動く存在だ。今回のガイアの夜明けは、ある小さな家電メーカーを舞台に、働く人の心を通して、働くことの意味や、幸せな働き方をみつめる。期待を背負いながら成長と迷いの狭間で揺れる若者。品質の最後の砦として“嫌われ役”を引き受ける中堅の覚悟。

	そして仕事人生の終盤に差しかかったベテランが抱える「仕事とは何か」という問い。中小企業の現場にあるのは、成功物語だけではない。やりがいと同時に、規模の小ささゆえの不安、代わりのいない重圧、生活の現実がある。日本経済の足元を支える場所で、人はなぜ働き続けるのか。その問いを、一人ひとりの個人の物語から描いていく。

	東京のディープな下町・小岩に、ちょっと変わった駐輪場がある。「お帰り」「遅かったね」「旅行のお土産どうぞ」…無人の駐輪場が増える中、ここでは駐輪場の人と利用者の温かな交流が続いてきた。毎朝の会話で元気が出ると語る清掃業の女性、幼いころから駐輪場の人に見守られて通学したという高校生。駐輪場は、家と目的地の間の通過点。でもここには、それ以上の何かがある。再開発が進み、変わりゆく街の日常を見つめた。

title: [Kekkan] Jishou Akuyaku Reijou na Konyakusha no Kansatsu Kiroku. - S01E02 (WebRip 1080p AV1 Multi-Subs Aliciä) / 自称悪役令嬢な婚約者の観察記録。 / An Observation Log of My Fiancée Who Calls Herself a Villainess / 02 / (Weekly)
description:
The encoder has just received an update. Starting from this episode, we'll be using the new version of the encoder. The reencoded episode 01 will come with the season batch.  

---

![Lady Bertia and Princee Cecil](https://i.imgur.com/llGF6cl.png)  

---

This is a high effort filtering and encoding for *Jishou Akuyaku Reijou na Konyakusha no Kansatsu Kiroku.*  
**slow.pics compare:** [https://slow.pics/c/UDRafGMJ](https://slow.pics/c/UDRafGMJ)  

This anime is quite harsh and has a lot of issues.  
For filtering, as usual, we first merge the OP using `vsdenoise.frequency_merge`.  
After that, we use a `MVTools` based processing focusing on two issues: stablising the heavy grain in the source and stabilising the flickering lineart in panning scenes. In order to fix the flickering and also maximise encoder detail retention, we choose `MotionMode.COHERENCE` for caculating MVs. For blocks with no valid MVs, we use a tuned `DFTTest` + `bm3d` to denoise. At last, to prevent removing too much noise in flashback scenes, we protect the processing with a frame mask made from `MVTools.mask` and `std.PlaneStats`.  

This anime has fairly strong aliasing and halo, and even chroma halo, but unfortunately it's not descalable.  
We use `EEDI2` via `vsTAAmbk.TAAmbk` and a `gaussian` based method via `fmtc.resample` to AA.  
For dehalo, on luma, we use `vsdehalo.dehalo_alpha` to dehalo, protected by mask created via `vsdehalo.fine_dehalo.mask` and a `bilateral` based protection. On chroma, we perform a light dehalo using `vsdehalo.edge_cleaner`, protected by mask created via `vsdehalo.fine_dehalo.mask`.  

For encoding, we use latest Apr 10 version of 5fish/SVT-AV1-PSY. We use `--lineart-psy-bias 3 --texture-psy-bias 4` as a base, while setting `--noise-psy-bias 2 --texture-ac-bias 3.0 --texture-energy-bias 1.10`, making it halfway to `--texture-psy-bias 5`. For `--crf`, we use `--crf 22.22` for this encode, and we also set `--high-quality-encode-psy-bias 1`. At last, to minimise unpleasant ringing caused by the remaining noise after filtering, we use `--psy-bias-sharpness-rounding 52`.  
We add a decently coarse layer of Simplex noise via a custom photon noise table to the encode.  

Thanks to all the people creating the tools, plugins and vsfunc's that make this possible, and thanks to everyone in the community for teaching me, pointing out issues, and giving me advice.  

If you're interested in AV1 encoding for anime, you are welcome to join AV1 weeb edition at [https://discord.gg/83dRFDFDp7](https://discord.gg/83dRFDFDp7).  

You are welcome to do anything with this encode, including remuxing and republishing it. However, we would ask you to leave a credit to Kekkan if you can.  

---

* **Video**:  
  [Kekkan] Filtered and reencoded, originally sourced from ToonsHub.  
* **Audio**:  
  Japanese  
  Untouched audio from ToonsHub.  
* **Subtitles**:  
  English / العربية / 中文（简体） / 中文（繁體） / français / Deutsch / bahasa Indonesia / italiano / bahasa Malaysia / português (Brasil) / русский / español (Latinoamérica) / español (España) / ไทย / Tiếng Việt  
  [Kekkan] restyled subtitles with additional fixes, originally sourced from ToonsHub.  
* **Chapters**:  
  [Kekkan] chapters.  

---

We recommend using MPV to playback our releases.  
Thank you for seeding after download.

title: [Trix] Koi Kaze S01 (Batch) [DVDRip 480p AV1 Opus] (Dual Audio, Multi Subs, VOSTFR) | Love Wind Koikaze 恋風 Season S1
description:
#### **Main info:**
- `[Trix]` -> that's me (@nekotrix), join [![](https://www.google.com/s2/favicons?domain=discord.com) AV1 weeb edition](https://discord.gg/83dRFDFDp7)
`Koi Kaze` -> anime title, info on [![](https://www.google.com/s2/favicons?domain=anidb.net) AniDB](https://anidb.net/anime/1675), [![](https://www.google.com/s2/favicons?domain=myanimelist.net) MyAnimeList](https://myanimelist.net/anime/634), [![](https://www.google.com/s2/favicons?domain=anilist.co) AniList](https://anilist.co/anime/634)
`S01` -> season number, following [![](https://www.google.com/s2/favicons?domain=thetvdb.com) TheTVDB](https://www.thetvdb.com/series/koi-kaze)'s scheme
`Batch` -> contains the complete season
- `DVDRip` -> encode from a DVD source (here [WSE](https://nyaa.si/view/1905414))
`480p` -> video resolution (712x478 @ ~23.976 VFR FPS)
`AV1` -> 📺 video format (Main + 4:2:0 + 10-bit = hardware friendly)
`Opus` -> 🔊 audio format (Stereo 2.0 @ 128/96kbps)
- `Dual Audio` -> 🔊 multiple audio tracks: **Japanese 🇯🇵 & English 🇺🇸**
`Multi Subs` -> 📄 multiple subtitles tracks including: **English (Full), English (Forced), French (Full)**
`VOSTFR` -> keyword to denote the presence of french subtitles
***
#### **Misc info:**
**Full Sources:** [WSE](https://nyaa.si/view/1905414) (Video, Audio, Subs, Chapters), [Cervoz](https://nyaa.si/view/718112) (Subs)

**Encoding details:**
- Encoder: [SVT-AV1-Tritium v3.1.2](https://github.com/Uranite/svt-av1-tritium) (based on [SVT-AV1-Essential](https://github.com/nekotrix/SVT-AV1-Essential/)) via Termux: `--preset 0 --crf 25`
- Command Line Used:
```
for file in *.mkv; do SvtAv1EncApp -i "$file" --progress 2 --preset 0 --crf 25 --tune 0 --film-grain 8 --min-keyint 33 --keyint 193 --scm 0 --alt-lambda-factors 0 --noise-norm-strength 0 --adaptive-film-grain 0 --kf-tf-strength 0 --qm-min 8 --qm-max 15 --chroma-qm-min 10 --enable-restoration 0 --noise-adaptive-filtering 0 --ac-bias 1.0 --tx-bias 3 --complex-hvs 1 --hbd-mds 1 --variance-boost-strength 2 --variance-octile 7 --luminance-qp-bias 5 --fast-decode 2 --enable-dlf 3 --cdef-scaling 12 --color-primaries bt709 --transfer-characteristics bt709 --matrix-coefficients bt709 -b "${file%.*}.ivf"; done
```

> **Tired of VLC acting up with Opus audio, with subtitles, with color rendition? We recommend the _MPV_ media player for the best playback experience ([TheWiki Guide](https://thewiki.moe/guides/playback/)). Always keep your software up-to-date!**

> **Direct Download Link:** [Episodes DDL, attachments download & more](https://animetosho.org/view/n2096396) on AnimeTosho

**Language Options**
You can [download here](https://mega.nz/folder/kcQhWZCA#c4wfvx2RXI9XN8XeBso09g) two scripts that do the following (Windows/macOS-Linux):

- *Keep Japanese*: Throws out all audio tracks other than Japanese
- *Keep English*: Throws out all audio and subtitles tracks other than English

Put all the video files into the *Language Options* folder and run the corresponding script. The resulting files can be found in the *output* folder.

Note: [MKVToolNix](https://mkvtoolnix.download/downloads.html) must be installed on your system
***

title: [Manny] Yu-Gi-Oh! Kaï Saison 2 (Partie 2) - 480p.MULTISUB.x264
description:
# **[Manny] Yu-Gi-Oh! Kaï Saison 2 (Partie 2) - 480p.MULTISUB.x264**
#
![](https://zupimages.net/up/26/06/bc2j.jpg)


### ![en](https://zupimages.net/up/22/45/2bsj.png)  **English presentation below**
#
# **PRÉSENTATION**
**Yu-Gi-Oh! Kaï** est une réinterprétation de l’animé Yu-Gi-Oh! qui se veut plus concise et plus conforme au manga original, et offrant un plus grand plaisir de visionnage. Les scènes HS sont coupées au maximum et certains passages sont remis dans le bon contexte afin d’obtenir une œuvre plus fidèle au manga.

Le projet se compose en deux parties. La première partie (du film 1 à 4) avec l'animé de la Toei Animation réalisé en 1998. Appelée aussi la "saison 0" par les fans, celle-ci n'a jamais vu le jour hors du Japon. Elle reprend les 7 premiers tomes du manga qui n'ont jamais été adapté chez nous. La deuxième partie avec l'animé "Duel Monsters" version japonaise, donc non censurée. Pas de VF pour ce projet, car ces deux animés n'ont jamais eu de doublage, et la VF (donc la version censurée) est trop différente du manga (passages canon pas adaptés etc).

Cette version, réalisée entièrement par mes soins (Manny), je vous propose une qualité énormissime, que ce soit au niveau du montage, de la vidéo (640x480) ainsi que pour la toute première fois une version multisub.

# **SYNOPSIS**
Yûgi Muto est un jeune lycéen continuellement harcelé par les autres élèves de son école. Un jour, il reçoit de son grand-père un objet trouvé lors d'une fouille en Égypte : le Puzzle Millénaire. Nul n'était auparavant parvenu à reconstituer cet objet antique, mais le jeune Yûgi réussit finalement à l'assembler. À cet instant est libéré l'esprit d'un ancien pharaon d'Égypte, enfermé jusqu'alors dans le puzzle, et qui prend possession du garçon. Les aventures de Yûgi et ses amis vont les amener à percer le mystère des Objets Millénaires…

Concernant les sous-titres, ils sont traduits par une IA depuis le français, il est donc probable que certaines traductions soient approximatives. Si vous voulez améliorer leur qualité en effectuant des corrections, vous pouvez nous contacter par discord

# **COMMENTAIRES**
Ces 3 films couvrent les épisodes **20 à 32 + 34 à 41 (Duel Monsters)**, chapitre **99 à 133** du manga
[Vous trouverez ici toute la correspondance entre les épisodes et chapitres de Yu Gi Oh!.](https://fan-kai.fandom.com/fr/wiki/Yu-Gi-Oh!_Ka%C3%AF)

Pour plus d’informations, des news, réagir sur nos Kais, et pour regarder nos films en streaming, RDV sur [notre Discord !](https://discord.gg/WvRsF4J "discord link")

Nous réalisons également des versions Fan-Kai de nombreux autres animes, en VF et/ou VOST : Bleach, Black Clover, D.Gray-Man, Dragon Ball, Fairy Tail, Hunter x Hunter, My Hero Academia, Naruto, One Piece et bien d’autres à venir…

## **INFOS UPLOAD**
Montage : Manny
Langues :  ![alt text](http://img.streetprez.com/flag/jp_JP.png "Japanese") Japonais
Sous-titres :  ![fr](https://img.streetprez.com/flag/fr_FR.png) Français (VOST ASS), ![en](https://zupimages.net/up/22/45/2bsj.png) Anglais (VOST ASS), ![it](https://i0.wp.com/img.streetprez.com/flag/it_IT.png) Italien (VOST ASS), ![por](https://i0.wp.com/img.streetprez.com/flag/pt_PT.png) Portugais (VOST ASS), ![es](https://i0.wp.com/img.streetprez.com/flag/es_ES.png) Espagnol (VOST ASS)...

Résolution : 640x480

![en](https://zupimages.net/up/22/45/2bsj.png)

# **PRESENTATION**
**Yu-Gi-Oh! Kai** is a reinterpretation of the Yu-Gi-Oh! anime series, designed to be more concise and faithful to the original manga, offering a more enjoyable viewing experience. Extraneous scenes have been cut as much as possible and certain passages have been put back into context in order to create a work that is more faithful to the manga.

The project consists of two parts. The first part (films 1 to 4) features the anime produced by Toei Animation in 1998. Also known as “season 0” by fans, it was never released outside Japan. It covers the first seven volumes of the manga, which were never adapted in our country. The second part features the Japanese version of the anime “Duel Monsters,” which is uncensored. There is no French version for this project, as these two anime series were never dubbed, and the French version (i.e., the censored version) is too different from the manga (canon passages not adapted, etc.).

This version, produced entirely by me (Manny), offers you tremendous quality, both in terms of editing and video (640x480), as well as a multisub version for the very first time
# **SYNOPSIS**
Yûgi Muto is a young high school student who is constantly bullied by the other students at his school. One day, he receives an object from his grandfather that was found during an excavation in Egypt: the Millennium Puzzle. No one had ever managed to piece together this ancient object before, but young Yûgi finally succeeds. At that moment, the spirit of an ancient Egyptian pharaoh, who had been trapped inside the puzzle until then, is released and takes possession of the boy. The adventures of Yûgi and his friends will lead them to unravel the mystery of the Millennium Items...

The subtitles are translated by AI from French, so some translations may be approximate. If you would like to improve their quality by making corrections, you can contact us via Discord.

# **COMMENTS**
These three films cover episodes **2 à 12 + 14 à 21 (Duel Monsters)**, chapters **60 à 98** of the manga
[You can find all the correspondences between Yu Gi Oh! episodes and chapters here.](https://fan-kai.fandom.com/fr/wiki/Yu-Gi-Oh!_Ka%C3%AF)

For more information, news, feedback on our Kais, and to watch our films in streaming, go to [our Discord!](https://discord.gg/WvRsF4J "discord link")

We also produce Fan-Kai versions of many other anime, in VF and/or VOST: Bleach, Black Clover, D.Gray-Man, Dragon Ball, Fairy Tail, Hunter x Hunter, My Hero Academia, Naruto, One Piece and many more to come...

title: On Your Mark (1995) オン・ユア・マーク [12-bit 4:2:0 Decrypted MGVC BD ISO VWBS-7540]
description:
On Your Mark from The Collected Works of Director Hayao Miyazaki / VWBS-7540

This release contains decrypted MGVC (Master Grade Video Coding) enhancement layer under the KDM folder.

Each ISO can be played back by Panasonic devices even in decrypted form, or compatible playback tools can decode a 12-bit 4:2:0 output.

MGVC: http://www.avsforum.com/t/1486405/36-bit-mgvc-blu-ray-only-in-japan

Due to how files are stored, an ISO is required to keep the virtual sector mapping on the .extif MVC stream without blowing up the size.

See /KDM/EDL.bin (XML text file) for a description of the virtual mapping.

Playback programs can use an H.264 MVC decoder and merge the planes according to [Patent US9392246B2](https://patents.google.com/patent/US9392246B2/en) or [Patent JP5914888B2](https://patents.google.com/patent/JP5914888B2/en) to get 12-bit 4:2:0 output.

title: My Neighbor Totoro (1988) となりのトトロ [12-bit 4:2:0 Decrypted MGVC BD ISO VWBS-1531]
description:
My Neighbor Totoro from The Collected Works of Director Hayao Miyazaki / VWBS-1531

This release contains decrypted MGVC (Master Grade Video Coding) enhancement layer under the KDM folder.

Each ISO can be played back by Panasonic devices even in decrypted form, or compatible playback tools can decode a 12-bit 4:2:0 output.

MGVC: http://www.avsforum.com/t/1486405/36-bit-mgvc-blu-ray-only-in-japan

Due to how files are stored, an ISO is required to keep the virtual sector mapping on the .extif MVC stream without blowing up the size.

See /KDM/EDL.bin (XML text file) for a description of the virtual mapping.

Playback programs can use an H.264 MVC decoder and merge the planes according to [Patent US9392246B2](https://patents.google.com/patent/US9392246B2/en) or [Patent JP5914888B2](https://patents.google.com/patent/JP5914888B2/en) to get 12-bit 4:2:0 output.

title: [LPF] Amnesia 01-12 (HDTV 720p x264 AAC)
description:
This torrent contains the whole Amnesia series (episodes from 1 to 12) with spanish subtitles by Lonely Princess no Fansub. This version includes hardcoded subtitles into the video, with colored fonts for the main characters, karaokes and translations for the different songs and signs or significant on-screen elements across the series.

Audio: Japanese
Subtitles: Spanish (Spain)
Resolution: 1280x720 (HDTV)

Synopsis

August 1st. The protagonist regains consciousness in an unfamiliar cafe, with no memories of the past. Where is this place? What was the protagonist doing here? Who and what kind of life did the protagonist live? A boy appears before the protagonist. The boy's name is Orion, and calls himself a fairy. Under Orion's direction, the protagonist gropingly searches for clues about himself. He eventually meets people who know him, a childhood friend, a senior, and a lover.

订阅突破1000万人的TOP级主播少女超绝最可爱天使酱——人称「超天酱」，没有一天看不到她活跃的身影。互联网、电视节目、LIVE……她总是活在粉丝们的欢呼声中。
有一个3位少女组成的主播组合将超天酱视为目标，其名为“卡拉马佐夫”。

title: [桜都字幕组] 主播女孩重度依赖 / Needy Girl Overdose [01][1080P][简繁内封]
description:
![](https://o365cn1-my.sharepoint.com/personal/cdn-cn_o365cn1_onmicrosoft_com/_layouts/52/download.aspx?share=IQBKOJun9XPFQZIm36HtZhJEAR08fzC-Zt1Y5GE4nDA5Is4)**STORY :**

订阅突破1000万人的TOP级主播少女超绝最可爱天使酱——人称「超天酱」，没有一天看不到她活跃的身影。互联网、电视节目、LIVE……她总是活在粉丝们的欢呼声中。
有一个3位少女组成的主播组合将超天酱视为目标，其名为“卡拉马佐夫”。
而在与这群主播们的活动相去甚远之处，有一位与小白脸男友同居、在主题咖啡店工作的少女——卡茜。
星星般闪耀的少女，与追求星星光芒的少女们共同谱写，令世人着迷的“互联网天使”的故事与屏幕另一端的“你”的故事在此拉开帷幕——

title: [VCB-Studio] 进击的巨人 / Shingeki no Kyojin / 進撃の巨人 10-bit 1080p HEVC BDRip [MOVIE 1-3 Reseed + MOVIE 4-5 + LIVE Fin]
description:
![POSTER8.webp](https://img.2222.moe/images/2026/04/06/POSTER8.webp)  
  
进击的巨人 / Shingeki no Kyojin / 進撃の巨人 Movies 1-3 Reseed + Movies 4-5 + Live Events BDRip  
  
Movie 5 内封原盘 JPN 字幕。  
Movie 5 includes embedded official JPN PGS.  
Movies 1-2 外挂 FLAC 5.1 + DTS Headphone X。Movies 3-4 外挂 FLAC 5.1。Movie 5 外挂 FLAC 5.1 + 无障碍音轨。  
Movies 1-2 include external MKA files containing FLAC 5.1 and DTS Headphone X. Movies 3-4 include MKA files containing FLAC 5.1. Movie 5 includes an MKA file containing FLAC 5.1 and audio description.  
  
本次发布的是《进击的巨人》各总集篇剧场版以及六个（有蓝光发售的）Live 活动 BDRip 合集。  
内容包括 5 部总集篇剧场版：  

*   红莲的弓矢，对应 TV 第一季前半部分（01-13）
*   自由之翼，对应 TV 第一季后半部分（14-25）
*   觉醒的咆哮，对应 TV 第二季（26-37）
*   编年史，对应 TV 第 1-3 季（01-59）
*   完结篇 THE LAST ATTACK，对应 TV 第四季完结篇（88-94）

还包括至今有蓝光发售的共 6 个 Live 活动：  

*   Attack 音 体感（2013）
*   Attack 音 体感2（2017）
*   Attack on Titan SPECIAL EVENT（2019）
*   进击的巨人 Orchestra Concert（2021）
*   进击的巨人 The Final Season SPECIAL EVENT（2022）
*   Attack 音 体感 Final（2024）

  
This release is a BDRip collection of all five Shingeki no Kyojin (a.k.a. Attack on Titan) recap movies, as well as six live events (that have Blu-ray available).  
The five recap movies are:  

*   Guren no Yumiya (TV 01-13)
*   Jiyuu no Tsubasa (TV 14-25)
*   Kakusei no Houkou (TV 26-37, i.e. Season 2)
*   Chronicle (TV 01-59, i.e. Season 1-3)
*   The Last Attack (TV 88-94, i.e. The Final Season Kanketsu-hen)

The six live events are:  

*   Attack on Taikan I (2013)
*   Attack on Taikan II (2017)
*   Attack on Titan SPECIAL EVENT (2019)
*   Shingeki no Kyojin Orchestra Concert (2021)
*   Shingeki no Kyojin The Final Season SPECIAL EVENT (2022)
*   Attack on Taikan Final (2024)

  

* * *

重发修正：  
1\. 按照现行规范重新收集并整理 CD 和扫图；  
2\. 调整了目录和视频的命名；  
3\. 按照现行规范重新调整视频的语言和默认轨道属性；  
4\. 补充之前 MOVIE 2 里遗漏的特典。

1\. Re-collected and re-organized CDs and scans according to current specifications;  
2\. Renamed directories and videos;  
3\. Re-adjusted the language and default track attributes of videos according to current specifications;  
4\. Added the previously missing SPs in MOVIE 2.

title: Spirited Away (2001) 千と千尋の神隠し [12-bit 4:2:0 Decrypted MGVC BD ISO VWBS-1531]
description:
Spirited Away from The Collected Works of Director Hayao Miyazaki / VWBS-1531

This release contains decrypted MGVC (Master Grade Video Coding) enhancement layer under the KDM folder.

Each ISO can be played back by Panasonic devices even in decrypted form, or compatible playback tools can decode a 12-bit 4:2:0 output.

MGVC: http://www.avsforum.com/t/1486405/36-bit-mgvc-blu-ray-only-in-japan

Due to how files are stored, an ISO is required to keep the virtual sector mapping on the .extif MVC stream without blowing up the size.

See /KDM/EDL.bin (XML text file) for a description of the virtual mapping.

Playback programs can use an H.264 MVC decoder and merge the planes according to [Patent US9392246B2](https://patents.google.com/patent/US9392246B2/en) or [Patent JP5914888B2](https://patents.google.com/patent/JP5914888B2/en) to get 12-bit 4:2:0 output.

title: [Sosuke] Kimagure Orange☆Road [1080p Sub Spa]
description:
Les traigo este excelente anime que mi amigo Sosuke se tomó poco más de un mes en adaptar y corregir los subtítulos para que puedan disfrutarlos.

Se aceptan felicitaciones de las personas que valoren y les guste el trabajo y a los que no se pueden ahorrar sus quejas.

Si hay algún error, favor de dejar un mensaje y con gusto se corrige.

Sinopsis:

Puede ser difícil mudarse a una nueva escuela, y Kyosuke, de quince años, lo tiene más difícil que la mayoría. Se ha caído de cabeza para su compañera de clase Madoka, una chica que ni siquiera le dará la hora del día, y sin querer terminó saliendo con su mejor amiga, Hikaru, en su lugar. Lo peor de todo es que Kyosuke y su familia tienen increíbles poderes sobrenaturales, ¡pero tiene que mantenerlos ocultos del resto del mundo! ¿Cómo va Kyosuke a equilibrar los afectos (o la falta de ellos) de dos niñas, el trabajo escolar y sus habilidades secretas al mismo tiempo?

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Que lo disfrutes zShionz, no olvides ayudar a que llegue a más gente.

title: Kiki's Delivery Service (1989) 魔女の宅急便 [12-bit 4:2:0 Decrypted MGVC BD ISO VWBS-1531]
description:
Kiki's Delivery Service from The Collected Works of Director Hayao Miyazaki / VWBS-1531

This release contains decrypted MGVC (Master Grade Video Coding) enhancement layer under the KDM folder.

Each ISO can be played back by Panasonic devices even in decrypted form, or compatible playback tools can decode a 12-bit 4:2:0 output.

MGVC: http://www.avsforum.com/t/1486405/36-bit-mgvc-blu-ray-only-in-japan

Due to how files are stored, an ISO is required to keep the virtual sector mapping on the .extif MVC stream without blowing up the size.

See /KDM/EDL.bin (XML text file) for a description of the virtual mapping.

Playback programs can use an H.264 MVC decoder and merge the planes according to [Patent US9392246B2](https://patents.google.com/patent/US9392246B2/en) or [Patent JP5914888B2](https://patents.google.com/patent/JP5914888B2/en) to get 12-bit 4:2:0 output.

📖 Synopsis
Sōichiro et Bob sont deux bagarreurs, habitués à faire régner leur loi par les poings dans les établissements scolaires qu'ils fréquentent. Mais l'école dans laquelle ils sont transférés est spéciale : la Tōdō Academy est un conservatoire des arts martiaux, où chaque élève doit en pratiquer un. Après quelques troubles, ils sont contrés par Maya, sa sœur Aya et Masataka, du Jyūkenbu club. Ils se rendent alors compte qu'un puissant groupe, les Exécuteurs (Enforcer), règne sur le campus et qu'ils auront besoin du soutien du club pour devenir assez forts.

title: Howl's Moving Castle (2004) ハウルの動く城 [12-bit 4:2:0 Decrypted MGVC BD ISO VWBS-1531]
description:
Howl's Moving Castle from The Collected Works of Director Hayao Miyazaki / VWBS-1531

This release contains decrypted MGVC (Master Grade Video Coding) enhancement layer under the KDM folder.

Each ISO can be played back by Panasonic devices even in decrypted form, or compatible playback tools can decode a 12-bit 4:2:0 output.

MGVC: http://www.avsforum.com/t/1486405/36-bit-mgvc-blu-ray-only-in-japan

Due to how files are stored, an ISO is required to keep the virtual sector mapping on the .extif MVC stream without blowing up the size.

See /KDM/EDL.bin (XML text file) for a description of the virtual mapping.

Playback programs can use an H.264 MVC decoder and merge the planes according to [Patent US9392246B2](https://patents.google.com/patent/US9392246B2/en) or [Patent JP5914888B2](https://patents.google.com/patent/JP5914888B2/en) to get 12-bit 4:2:0 output.

title: ＢＳスペシャル　モサド　ポケベル爆発事件の全貌
description:
ＢＳスペシャル　モサド　ポケベル爆発事件の全貌
[BS] 
2026年04月09日 午後11:25 〜 午前0:25 (1時間0分)
要人暗殺など数々の秘密工作に関与してきたイスラエルの諜報機関・モサド。関係者の証言から、２０２４年にレバノンで発生したポケベル同時爆発事件の衝撃の内実に迫る。

	世界最強の諜報機関と言われるイスラエル・モサド。敵対するヒズボラや後ろ盾のイランの要人暗殺に深く関与してきた。その実態は長年闇に包まれてきたが、今回、２０２４年にレバノンで引き起こされたポケベル同時爆発事件の関係者が、知られざる工作の舞台裏を語った―ポケベルにはどんな工作が施され、ヒズボラの警戒網をどう突破したのか…。中東のみならず、欧州、台湾そして日本、世界規模で展開された秘密工作の全貌に迫る。

title: カンブリア宮殿【不人気沿線からの逆襲！“行ってみたい沿線”への大変革】
description:
カンブリア宮殿【不人気沿線からの逆襲！“行ってみたい沿線”への大変革】
テレ東
4月9日 木曜 23:06 -23:55 
“地味だけど住みやすい”　そんな京王線を“行ってみたい沿線”へと変えるため、都村社長が仕掛ける新たな街づくりや事業戦略とは？

	人口減少やリモートワークの普及により、鉄道会社は“戦後最大の転換期”を迎えている。通勤客の減少で鉄道収入が伸び悩む中、各社は「鉄道以外の収益」をどう伸ばすかという課題に直面している。そんな中、業界で注目を集めているのが京王電鉄だ。2026年3月期の売上高は過去最高の5020億円を見込む。長年のライバル・小田急電鉄を34年ぶりに上回った。

	しかし一方で、京王線は「沿線住民以外の人気が低い」という課題も抱えてきた。“地味だけど住みやすい”　そんな京王線を“行ってみたい沿線”へと変えるため、都村社長が仕掛ける新たな街づくりや事業戦略とは？人口減少時代、鉄道会社の生き残り策を探る。

オーバーツーリズムが深刻なイタリア・ベネチアでは４月から、観光客全体の７割を占める日帰り客に対して入場料が課せられることになる。観光と街の共存のあり方とは。

	「水の都」として知られるイタリア・ベネチアでは４月から、観光客全体の７割を占める日帰り観光客に対して入場料が課せられることになる。背景には、運河と島で成り立つが故に道路の拡張やインフラの増強が難しいことや、物流やごみの回収が水路に依存していることなど、「水の都」特有の課題がある。観光客は住民の約６００倍。ベネチアが直面する深刻なオーバーツーリズムの実態を通し、観光と街の共存のあり方を問う。

description:

[Ｅテレ] 
2026年04月09日 午後9:30 〜 午後10:00 (30分)
いわゆる本能寺の変で信長を討ち、裏切り者という印象が強い明智光秀。歴史の表舞台に出るまではどんな人生だったのか？新史料と勝負メシから見えてきた素顔とは・・・。

	足利義昭の家臣としてその名が記録に現れるまで、何をしていたのか詳しくわかっていない光秀。２０１３年、その謎のいったんを伺い知ることのできる新史料が見つかった。そこから想像できる光秀の一面とは？勝負メシ１皿目は、鯉料理。信長に仕えた光秀には、将軍や幕府、朝廷とのパイプ役という重要な任務があった。おもてなしの料理を、ネプチューンが再現！そして本能寺の変を考察、動機は一体どこに・・・？

俳優・六角精児が「酒」と「鉄道」という偏った視点で旅する▽冬の三重県、近鉄列車で四日市から賢島までの旅▽めったに入荷しない松阪牛の希少部位に舌鼓！▽語り・壇蜜

	三重の夜は津でおばんざいの店へ▽店主は元砲丸投げ日本一！▽常連客も食べていない希少部位「牛のカッパ」って？▽特注の木の釜で酒米を蒸す酒蔵、仕込みは水道水！▽みたらし団子、射的、伊勢うどん…伊勢神宮内宮の参道「おはらい町」を満喫！▽伊勢市で唯一の小さな造り酒屋。仕込み水は神域を流れる五十鈴川の伏流水！▽近鉄山田線、鳥羽線、志摩線を各駅停車でのんびり賢島まで▽かつて真珠養殖機材を運んだ駅の跡地を訪ねる

	オペラ、交響曲、室内楽、ピアノ曲…３５　年の生涯で、　６００　曲以上を生み出したモーツァルト。「天才」の一言で語られがちだが、その歩みは努力と挫折が交錯する毎日だった。彼はいかにして“モーツァルト”になったのか。２５　歳までの知られざる成長の物語をひも解く。ゲストは、モーツァルトも演じたことがある元宝塚歌劇団トップスター・礼真琴さん。圧巻の交響曲第　２５　番や美し～いピアノ・ソナタもお見逃しなく！

	２３分の１。今回のテーマは「生活の拠点がいくつもある人」。都会と自然豊かな地方など２つ以上の拠点を行き来するライフスタイルに注目が集まっている。２０歳から７９歳を対象とした調査では「複数拠点生活」をおこなっている人は２３人にひとり（転勤や介護を除く）。番組は東京ではグラフィックデザイナー、山梨では朝ごはんを出すカフェを営む女性を取材。二拠点生活で彼女が見つけた喜びとは？

**Описание:**
Продолжение истории.
Бывший работник компании Мачио Хираку с 30-и лет валялся в больнице, не в силах справиться с болезнью. Но в 39 лет над ним смилостливился Бог из другого мира: вылечил, омолодил, дал кучу перков (Мачио решил не болеть, жить в спокойном месте, знать местные языки и быть фермером). Ну а в довершение Бог выдал Мачио «Универсальный фермерский инструмент», который выглядит как мотыга, но по его желанию может превращаться в разные инструменты. В другом мире Мачио начал обустраивать свою новую жизнь и менять жизни тех, кто к нему присоединялся (потихоньку собирая себе гарем).

# Kirio Fan Club S01E01 (AV1)

![alt text](https://artworks.thetvdb.com/banners/v4/series/456679/posters/69cbc548be4f6.jpg "Kirio Fan Club")

## Résumé

Suivez le quotidien de deux lycéennes, Aimi Miyoshi et Nami Sometani, qui ont fondé, en secret, un fanclub dédié à l'un de leur camarade de classe, le Kirio Fanclub.

## Compléments

Version AV1 10 bits convertie par mes soins.
J’ai développé un script complet qui me permet de déterminer automatiquement le niveau de compression le plus adapté pour chaque épisode, afin de réduire la taille des fichiers tout en conservant une bonne qualité de lecture sur votre poste.

Bien que ce procédé ne soit pas la méthode la plus optimale d’un point de vue technique, il offre un excellent compromis et permet d’obtenir un très bon ratio qualité/poids pour chaque épisode.

title: [桜都字幕组] 入间同学入魔了 第四季 / Mairimashita! Iruma-kun (2026) [01][1080P][简繁内封]
description:
![](https://files.seeusercontent.com/2026/04/09/bKr2/4.jpg)

STORY : 
铃木入间隐藏自己是人类的事实，在恶魔学校巴比鲁斯 上学。随着恶魔朋友的增加，他在不知不觉中开始变得能享受魔界生活，并在各种活动中大放异彩！他一路提升在魔界的阶级，渐渐成为在校内外都备受注目的存在。

现在入间又有一项新的挑战，那就是考验班级凝聚力的＜音乐节＞！由于校方提出的课题：入间所待的问题儿童（阿布诺玛）班的13人必须全员达成「阶级4」的这项空前绝后的无理要求，在最后的升级机会音乐祭中取得优胜成为了达成这项课题的绝对条件。然而，班上还有另一名「不被容许引人注意的恶魔」……。

入间他们，究竟能否让13人全员一起站上舞台呢――！？

原作: 西修（秋田書店「週刊少年チャンピオン」連載）

description:
#### JPEG-XL VISUALLY LOSSLESS (-d 1.0) VERSION.

| Volumes | Resolution | Source | Denoised | Leveled | Spreads | Posterized | Clean Raws |
|  :---------: | :------------: | :--------: | :-----------: | :---------: | :---------: | :-------------: | :--------------: |
| 1-12 | x2560* | [Manga UP! Global App](https://global.manga-up.com/manga/168) | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ❌ (JXL) | ✅ | 
*Chapters 12 in v03 & 13, 15, and 16 in v04 & 20 in v05 & 24 in v06 are x3072.

*These compiled volumes include raw pages from the Japanese volumes to keep the page count and numbering correct for ‘complete’ tank-style volumes.*
- Volumes 1-9 contain the omakes from the official SQUARE ENIX USA volumes.

----

***The JPEG-XL images are created from the denoised PNGs after converting from AVIF.***
To open JPEG-XL images your reading software need to support this, check [here](https://wotaku.wiki/guides/manga/jxl) for supported software.
Komga (and Kavita Canary) is able to open and serve JXL files, they will auto-convert if accessing (OPDS) application does not handle JXL.

----

Volumes 01-12 contain chapters 001-048, chapters only in PNG: https://nyaa.si/view/2095927
Compiled tank-style volumes 01-12 of chapters 001-048 in PNG: https://nyaa.si/view/2095928

title: [Unfucked] Gals Can't Be Kind to Otaku!? - S01E01 (1080p CR WEB-DL AVC AAC 2.0) | Otaku ni Yasashii Gal wa Inai!?
description:
TS taken from the Latin American Spanish track, merged with English, very minor edits

if a fansub group picks the show up, or CR unfucks the show themselves, i will drop it

__only the English track has been edited. the rest are untouched from Crunchyroll__

---

#### **what is this?**

crunchyroll has been trying to make the switch to a new subtitling pipeline that strips away typesetting. this means on-screen text like signs, phone screens, and letters, which used to be styled to blend in better with the actual on-screen text, are now just generic, centered white text that often clutters the screen. the "Unfucked" project is where i merge the English script with typesetting from other language tracks to make it more watchable for English viewers.

if you see these "Unfucked" versions of a show, it is because that show has unfortunately fallen victim to their arbitrary subtitle enshittification for its English subs. you can learn more about all of this [here](https://daiz.moe/crunchyroll-is-destroying-its-subtitles-for-no-good-reason/)

**Cancel Your Crunchyroll Subscription**

title: [动漫国字幕组&恶魔岛字幕组&豌豆字幕组&VCB-Studio] 进击的巨人 / Shingeki no Kyojin / Attack on Titan / 進撃の巨人 10-bit 1080p HEVC BDRip [S1-4 + OADs Reseed Fin]
description:
![Shingeki no Kyojin.webp](https://img.2222.moe/images/2025/09/29/36919953_p0_800.webp)  

进击的巨人 / Shingeki no Kyojin / Attack on Titan / 進撃の巨人 S1-4 + OADs BDRip Reseed   

这个项目与 **动漫国字幕组** 和 **恶魔岛字幕组** 和 **豌豆字幕组** 合作，感谢他们精心制作的字幕。  
This project is in collaboration with **DMG** & **EMD** & **Beansub**. Thanks to them for crafting Chinese subtitles.  

本次发布的是《进击的巨人》TV 版与 OAD 的 BDRip 合集，包括了 TV 版 1-4 季度共 94 集（含完结篇）以及共 8 集 OAD。其他内容，包括各总集篇剧场版及 Live 活动的 BDRip，准备再等一等第四季总集篇剧场版 BD 发售之后一起发布。  
本片原盘画质都还可以：有微弱锯齿和一些色带，第四季则额外有较为明显的晕轮。这些问题使用常规处理手段都可以较好地修复。  
字幕方面，我们分别与动漫国字幕组&恶魔岛字幕组（第一季、OAD 01）、动漫国字幕组（第二季、OAD 04-05）、豌豆字幕组（第三季 Part.2、第四季、OAD 06-08）合作。感谢所有参与这些字幕制作的人们的辛勤劳动。遗憾的是，第三季前半当年就没有任何我们能联系到的字幕组开坑，而我们试图联系的其他字幕组都表示 OAD 02-03 的字幕原文件早已丢失，所以这部分的字幕就只好欠缺了。  
This release is a BDRip collection of *Shingeki no Kyojin*, covering the TV series and OADs: Seasons 1-4 (94 episodes in total, including THE FINAL CHAPTERS) plus 8 OAD episodes. Other content—including the compilation film and the Live event BDRips—will be released together after the Season 4 compilation film BD is released.  
The source looks fine overall: slight aliasing and some banding, and Season 4 additionally shows more noticeable haloing. These issues can be corrected well with routine post-processing.  
For subtitles, we collaborated with DMG & EMD (Season 1; OAD 01), DMG (Season 2; OAD 04-05), and Beansub (Season 3 Part.2; Season 4; OAD 06-08). Many thanks to everyone who worked hard on these subtitles. Unfortunately, no group we could reach had taken on the first half of Season 3 at the time. Other groups we contacted told us the original subtitle files for OAD 02-03 had long been lost, so subtitles for those parts are absent, regrettably.  


* * *

重发修正：  
1\. 修复 S1 正片第 12 话的画面问题；   
2\. 为 S4 的 OST 增补扫图。   

Reseed comment:  
1\. Fix visual issues in S1 Main Episode 12;   
2\. Add scans for the S4 OST.  


* * *

感谢所有参与制作者 / Thanks to our participating members:   
总监 / Script: はかせ   
压制 / Encode: 助手ちゃん   
整理 / Collate: maboroshi   
发布 / Upload: dc, aline   
分流 / Seed: VCB-Studio CDN 分流成员   

感谢所有资源提供者 / Thanks to all resource providers:   
CDs: {岭上菊花, phoenixluan, sakurasekai, 無幻剎那, 394730122}@ASTOST, {KAKAROT, 梅娅·S·艾菲梅拉尔}@U2, {Kensh1n, SpaceMilkA79, MysteryKeeper, kanest, iamchq, mucc6, twfx1207}@JPopsuki, kayabe@HAYAKU, Genocyber@AnimeBytes   
Scans: {KAKAROT, danieleg}@U2  


* * *

本次发布来自 VCB-Studio 旧作重发计划。我们会不定期重发过去发布过的合集，或为补充做种，或为修正制作错漏，或为整合系列合集。  
This is a release of VCB-Studio Reseed Project. We would re-upload previous torrents from time to time, to resurrect old torrents with few seeders, to correct errors/omissions, or to batch separate releases that belong to a same series.

| Movie 5 | JPN | JPBD | Stereo | FLAC |  kneelack |
| Movie 5 | ENG | AMZN WEB-DL | 5.1 Surround | FLAC | kneelack (synced by izzybell) |

### Subtitles
| Movie | Language | Style | Format | Provided by | Timing by | Styled by |
| :-: | :-: | :-: | :-: | :-: | :-: | :-: |
| Movie 1-5 | ENG | Signs & Songs | ASS | Underwater-FFF (1) / Saizen (2) / FUCKILL (5) | kneelack / ZeBenko | Underwater-FFF (1) / Saizen (2) / FUCKILL kneelack / ZeBenko |
| Movie 1-5 | ENG | Stylized Subtitles | ASS | kneelack | kneelack / ZeBenko / izzybell (5) / FUCKILL (5) | Underwater-FFF (1) / Saizen (2) / FUCKILL (5) / kneelack / ZeBenko |
| Movie 5 | ENG | Dubtitles | ASS | kneelack | kneelack / ZeBenko / izzybell | kneelack / ZeBenko |
| Movie 4-5 | JPN | Japanese SDH | PGS | kneelack | - | - |

Notes / Description:
"Somebody owes me 30 dollars for this. Or something. Anyway, prepare to get visually fisted by acclaimed director of Japanese Wacky Races, Takeshi Koike as he treats you to a tour de force of gore and tits through five LUPIN THE IIIRD movies. Now in the highest quality, fit with official subtitles for all five." - kneelack
This project started simple and ended in hell, thanks GKIDS.

Video for the first 3 movies are sourced from the Discotek US Blu-Rays as their encodes are basically transparent and it's all I had access to. Movies 4 & 5 used the recently released JP Blu-Ray (purchased by ME).

Audio is the same except Movie 4 & 5's dubs are sourced from Amazon, 5 had to be adjusted to 23.976 and synced from there, all audio was losslessly converted to FLAC with eac3to with the exception of the dub of Movie 4.

Subtitles for the first 3 were sourced from the Discotek US Blu-Rays, OCR'd and corrected, alongside signs from the existing fansubs minus Movie 3 which had no usable typeset. ZeBenko further added typeset lyrics for all the movies. Movie 4's subtitles had various typos, naming errors, and grammar fixes done. Movie 5's subtitles is where the hell started. For some unexplained reason the Amazon US subtitles were completely out of sync and basically unusable, however the hardcoded subtitles on Fandango At Home were not out of sync. In the time it took to this to get this done, Brazillian fansub group FUCKILL released their fansubs for the movie. Using a mixture of timing the subs to the Fandango WEB rip and the Brazilian fansubs, me and the 2 other project members managed to correctly sync the English subtitles. A very special thanks to FUCKILL for their work (we also used their credits typeset), thanks to Aisterion for the translation for THE IIIRD EYE, and a special fuck you to GKIDS for their horrendously unprofessional release.

I'm taking a long nap after this, me, izzy and Benko hope you enioy.

give us money while you're at it

ZeBenko: https://ko-fi.com/zebenko

description:
From washed:

---

![eh?](https://i.imgur.com/QyVBYWz.png)
> **Translation:** NF
**Everything else:** washed

WEB encode with modified NF subtitles. Originally I was planning on giving this the full fansub treatment, which I will not be doing for two reasons:

1. The prosubs are watchable, if not all that interesting.
2. I’m hardly a competent typesetter, so the kinds of signs this show has won’t allow me to keep a comfortable pace.

So given those things, you can expect retiming, light editing, and a bit of (mediocre) typesetting from these releases, along with songs and general cleanup of Netflix’s usual subtitle issues. There’s also an honorifics track for those who prefer it. Similar to previous releases, I will not go out of my way to get typesetting help for this, but if anyone wants to contribute please let me know via Discord! I don’t want to make any guarantees for release schedule given my previous failures, but I’ll try to get episodes out before the next episode airs. Third time’s the charm?

[MediaInfo](https://rentry.co/c8f9upfh) | [Script comparison](https://www.diffchecker.com/iWBK7BaG/) | [Encode comparison](https://slow.pics/c/qPc9ij2U)

If you would like to be notified of any future releases, or if there are any problems with this release, please join my [Discord server](https://discord.gg/HUHnKs3Va3).*

description:

We're back at it again with a new season of Re:Zero! We used Crunchyroll as base, and fixed as many major mistranslations as we could find. Cross referenced a bit with the novel and with Muse Asia's release. 
I did a bit of cleaning up on my own end line by line. It also has proper typesetting thanks to Freehold! Very little focus on retiming needed since it was already pretty consistent. Re:Zero fans should probably use and share this release for now. I apologize for being so slow this time around. Hopefully I can speed up later, but knowing the contents of this arc...yeah.

title: 世界のドキュメンタリー「シャドー・スカラーズ　後編　影のライターたちの現実」
description:
世界のドキュメンタリー「シャドー・スカラーズ　後編　影のライターたちの現実」
[BS] 
2026年04月08日 午後11:25 〜 午前0:14 (49分)
報酬を受け取って先進国の大学生のために論文やレポートを代筆する「シャドー・スカラーズ」。オックスフォード大学の教授がケニアで、巨大な代筆産業の実態を追う。後編

	オーストラリアやイギリスが論文代筆ビジネスを規制。生成ＡＩも「影のライター」たちの生活を脅かし始めていた。ケニアでは自分の将来に向け行動を起こす若者も。この問題を調査する教授は「アイデアの価値が軽視される社会システムが問題の核心」だと思い至る。自分の調査内容を盗んだ講演が開かれると気づいた教授は主催する王立協会に乗り込んでいく。原題：Ｔｈｅ　Ｓｈａｄｏｗ　Ｓｃｈｏｌａｒｓ（イギリス　２０２４年）

title: 国際報道２０２６　学びの場が置き換えられるアフガニスタン
description:
国際報道２０２６　学びの場が置き換えられるアフガニスタン
[BS] 
2026年04月08日 午後10:00 〜 午後10:45 (45分)

アフガニスタンでは女性も通うことが許されるイスラム教の神学校「マドラサ」の数が急増している。イスラム主義勢力タリバンのねらいとは。

	アフガニスタンでは、イスラム主義勢力タリバンによって女性が学校に通えるのは小学校までとする措置が続いている。その一方で、女性も通うことが許されるイスラム教の神学校「マドラサ」の数は急増している。背景にはタリバンがマドラサの拡大を通じて支配のための思想的基盤を強化しようとしているとの見方もある。マドラサへの通学を強いられる家庭の取材などを通じて、学びの場が置き換えられようとしている実態を伝える。

title: おとなのＥテレタイムマシン　きょうの料理　陳建民　かにの淡雪いため
description:
おとなのＥテレタイムマシン　きょうの料理　陳建民　かにの淡雪いため
[Ｅテレ] 
2026年04月08日 午後10:30 〜 午後10:56 (26分)
ＮＨＫの膨大なアーカイブから選りすぐりの番組をリマスターでお届けする。今回は１９８６年放送の、きょうの料理「陳建民　かにの淡雪いため」。

	ＮＨＫの膨大なアーカイブから選りすぐりの番組をリマスターでお届け。今回は１９８６年放送の、きょうの料理「陳建民　かにの淡雪いため」です。中国料理を家庭でも手軽にできるようコツを伝えて人気を博した陳建民さんの見事な手さばきも見どころです。

title: ザ・バックヤード　知の迷宮の裏側探訪　福井県年縞（ねんこう）博物館
description:
ザ・バックヤード　知の迷宮の裏側探訪　福井県年縞（ねんこう）博物館
[Ｅテレ] 
2026年04月08日 午後10:00 〜 午後10:30 (30分)
福井県の湖底。堆積物が７万年もかかって作り上げたシマ模様、世界的にも超貴重な年縞（ねんこう）がここにある。地球の変化を刻み込んだ「年代測定のものさし」の正体は？

	年縞（ねんこう）を生み出した福井県水月湖に生じた３つの奇跡。川なし・大風なし・堆積物で埋まることなし。整然と積み重なるシマ模様は過去の地球の実態をさぐる情報の宝庫だ。挟まった木の葉から、シベリアのマンモスの年代までわかっちゃう？ワールドワイドに活用される「年代測定のものさし」とは？　花粉の量や種類を分析すれば、その時代の植生や気候変動まで見えてくる。そこからは気になる地球の未来も…？

title: 歴史探偵　吉野の桜
description:
歴史探偵　吉野の桜
[総合] 
歴史探偵　吉野の桜2026年04月08日 午後10:00 〜 午後10:45 (45分)
桜の名所、奈良吉野。ルーツは飛鳥時代の超人だった！？天下人秀吉も深いゆかりが。空前絶後、５千人の花見に秘められた野望とは？吉野の桜１３００年の歴史を解き明かす。

	日本随一の桜の名所、奈良・吉野。なぜ桜の名所になったのか？　「鬼の子孫」という男性を訪ね、調査すると、たどりついたのは役行者。修験道の開祖と桜の意外な関係とは！？天下人・豊臣秀吉も吉野の桜と深いゆかりが。秀吉が行った空前絶後、５０００人の花見には、どのようなもくろみがあったのか。幻の「能」を再現、隠された意図を読み解く。１３００年にわたって人々の願いがこめられてきた「吉野の桜」の歴史を解き明かす。

title: ３か月でマスターする西洋美術（１）人間美を追求～ギリシャ・ローマ～
description:
３か月でマスターする西洋美術（１）人間美を追求～ギリシャ・ローマ～
[Ｅテレ] 
2026年04月08日 午後9:30 〜 午後10:00 (30分)
古代ギリシャから現代へー潮流を学ぶと、美が見えてくる。大人の学びなおしシリーズ。全１２回。第１回はギリシャ・ローマ。「ミロのヴィーナス」「サモトラケのニケ」等

	西洋美術の美しさの原点ともいわれるギリシャ美術時代とともに作品を鑑賞する▽神々が人間の姿をしている彫刻。その理由とは？▽ギリシャ彫刻を３つの期間にわけて特徴をとらえる▽ミケランジェロも魅せられた「ラオコーン群像」美しさの秘密は？▽ギリシャ彫刻を後世に伝えたローマンコピー▽ポンペイ遺跡の絵画▽ナビゲーターは、絵画を勉強中の漫才師・土屋伸之さん。美術史家・田中久美子先生とわかりやすくお伝えします。
